name: Conspiracy: Take the Crown

draft.notes: 15-card pack plus an additional ad card. Pack: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 conspiracy, 1 ad card. Foil conspiracies displace the conspiracy slot; otherwise a foil displaces a common and appears immediately after the rare. Almost certainly not possible for two foils in one pack. The conspiracy slot is rare or mythic in 1/6 of packs.

statedRates: conspiracy slot is rare/mythic in 1/6 of packs (includes foils)
sourceNotes: Draft-matters supplemental set. Composition also includes 12 conspiracy cards and 15 cards with draft-related abilities (the draft-related cards are collated with the normal cards, unlike original Conspiracy). Kaya, Ghost Assassin has alternate foil art (222/221). Printed in USA. 36 packs per box.
